member.name: T:Skua.Core.Models.Auras.Aura
member.summary: Represents an aura effect, including its properties such as name, type, duration, and status information.
member.remarks: An aura typically describes a temporary or passive effect applied to an entity, such as a buff, debuff. This class provides information about the aura's identity, timing, and visual representation. Some properties, such as TimeStamp and ExpiresAt, are computed for convenience.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Auras.Aura.Value
member.summary: The aura's stack value/count.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Auras.Aura.Icon
member.summary: The icon file name for the aura.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Auras.Aura.Name
member.summary: The name of the aura.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Auras.Aura.Type
member.summary: The type of the aura.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Auras.Aura.cLeaf
member.summary:
This should always return "cycle_" as having cLeaf inside of an aura causes a circular reference.
We manually set the cLeaf to equal to "cycle_" to avoid this .

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Auras.Aura.Duration
member.summary: The duration of the aura in seconds.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Auras.Aura.IsNew
member.summary: Whether this is a new aura.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Auras.Aura.UnixTimeStamp
member.summary: The timestamp when the aura was applied - Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Auras.Aura.Passive
member.summary: If the aura is a passive or not.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Auras.Aura.PotionType
member.summary: The potion type of aura if it's a potion.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Auras.Aura.TimeStamp
member.summary: DateTime timestamp (computed from Unix timestamp).

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Auras.Aura.ExpiresAt
member.summary: The expiration time of the aura.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Auras.Aura.RemainingTime
member.summary: Gets the remaining time of the aura (int).

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Auras.Aura.Category
member.summary: The debuff type of aura. (e.g. stun, stone, disable)

member.name: T:Skua.Core.Models.DialogResult
member.summary: An object with the button text and index from the shown dialog.
member.param: Text of the button that was clicked.
Value of the button that was clicked.

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Models.DialogResult.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: An object with the button text and index from the shown dialog.
member.param: Text of the button that was clicked.
Value of the button that was clicked.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.DialogResult.Text
member.summary: Text of the button that was clicked.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.DialogResult.Value
member.summary: Value of the button that was clicked.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.DialogResult.Cancelled
member.summary: Default when the dialog is closed or cancelled.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Factions.Faction.ID
member.summary: The ID of the faction.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Factions.Faction.Name
member.summary: The in-game name of the faction.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Factions.Faction.Rank
member.summary: The rank that the player has achieved in this faction.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Factions.Faction.TotalRep
member.summary: The total amount of rep the player has for this faction.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Factions.Faction.Rep
member.summary: The amount of rep the player has for their current rank.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Factions.Faction.RequiredRep
member.summary: The total required rep for the player to rank up.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Factions.Faction.RemainingRep
member.summary: The remaining amount of rep required for the player to rank up.

member.name: T:Skua.Core.Models.GameActions
member.summary: An enumeration of actions that the game requires to be cooled down before use.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Models.GameActions.LoadShop
member.summary: Loading a shop.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Models.GameActions.LoadEnhShop
member.summary: Loading an enhancement shop.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Models.GameActions.LoadHairShop
member.summary: Loading a hair shop.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Models.GameActions.EquipItem
member.summary: Equipping an item.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Models.GameActions.UnequipItem
member.summary: Unequipping an ite.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Models.GameActions.BuyItem
member.summary: Buying an item.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Models.GameActions.SellItem
member.summary: Selling an item.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Models.GameActions.GetMapItem
member.summary: Getting a map item (i.e. via the getMapItem packet).

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Models.GameActions.TryQuestComplete
member.summary: Sending a quest completion packet.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Models.GameActions.AcceptQuest
member.summary: Accepting a quest.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Models.GameActions.DoIA
member.summary: I don't know...

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Models.GameActions.Rest
member.summary: Resting.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Models.GameActions.Who
member.summary: I don't know...

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Models.GameActions.Transfer
member.summary: Joining another map.

member.name: T:Skua.Core.Models.HuntPriorities
member.summary: An enum describing hunting priority behaviour.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Models.HuntPriorities.None
member.summary: No priority.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Models.HuntPriorities.LowHP
member.summary: Prioritises monsters with the lowest HP.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Models.HuntPriorities.HighHP
member.summary: Prioritises monsters with the highest HP.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Models.HuntPriorities.Close
member.summary: Prioritises monsters which are in the same cell.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Items.InventoryItem.CharItemID
member.summary: The character (instance) ID of this item.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Items.InventoryItem.Equipped
member.summary: Indicates if the item is equipped.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Items.InventoryItem.Level
member.summary: The level of the item.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Items.InventoryItem.EnhancementLevel
member.summary: The enhancement level of the item.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Items.ItemBase.ID
member.summary: The ID of the item.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Items.ItemBase.Name
member.summary: The name of the item.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Items.ItemBase.Description
member.summary: The description of the item.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Items.ItemBase.Quantity
member.summary: The quantity of the item in this stack.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Items.ItemBase.MaxStack
member.summary: The maximum stack size this item can exist in.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Items.ItemBase.Upgrade
member.summary: Indicates if the item is a member/upgrade only item.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Items.ItemBase.Wearing
member.summary: Indicates whether the item is currently being worn.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Items.ItemBase.Coins
member.summary: Indicates if the item is an AC item.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Items.ItemBase.CategoryString
member.summary: The category of the item.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Items.ItemBase.EnhancementPatternID
member.summary:
The enhancement pattern ID of the item. This identifies the current enhancement type of the item.
1: Adventurer
2: Fighter
3: Thief
4: Armsman
5: Hybrid
6: Wizard
7: Healer
8: Spellbreaker
9: Lucky
10: Forge
11: Absolution
12: Avarice
23: Depths
24: Vainglory
25: Vim
26: Examen
27: Pneuma
28: Anima
29: Penitence
30: Lament
32: Hearty

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Items.ItemBase.ProcID
member.summary:
The ProcID of the item. This identifies the current special enhancement (E.G. Forge and AWE enhancements).
2: Spiral Carve
3: Awe Blast
4: Health Vamp
5: Mana Vamp
6: Powerword DIE
7: Lacerate
8: Smite
9: Valiance
10: Arcana's Concerto
11: Acheron
12: Elysium
13: Praxis
14: Dauntless
15: Ravenous

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Items.ItemBase.Temp
member.summary: Indicates if the item is a temporary item.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Items.ItemBase.ItemGroup
member.summary: The group of the item. co = Armor; ba = Cape; he = Helm; pe = Pet; Weapon = Weapon.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Items.ItemBase.FileName
member.summary: The name of the source file of the item.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Items.ItemBase.FileLink
member.summary: The link to the source file of the item.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Items.ItemBase.Meta
member.summary: The meta value of the item. This is used to link buffs (xp boosts etc).

member.name: T:Skua.Core.Models.MessageInfo
member.summary: A class holding information about a packet.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.MessageInfo.Content
member.summary: The content of the packet being intercepted. This can be modified.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.MessageInfo.Send
member.summary: Whether to pass the packet through the proxy.

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Models.MessageInfo.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the MessageInfo class with the given content.

member.name: T:Skua.Core.Models.Monsters.Monster
member.summary: Class that represents the object data of a Monster

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Monsters.Monster.Name
member.summary: The name of the monster.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Monsters.Monster.ID
member.summary: The global ID of the monster.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Monsters.Monster.Race
member.summary: The race of the monster.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Monsters.Monster.Cell
member.summary: The cell the monster is in.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Monsters.Monster.MapID
member.summary: The map ID of the monster.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Monsters.Monster.HP
member.summary: The monster's current HP.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Monsters.Monster.MaxHP
member.summary: The monster's max HP.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Monsters.Monster.State
member.summary: The state of the monster.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Monsters.Monster.FileName
member.summary: The SWF file name of the monster.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Monsters.Monster.Alive
member.summary: Indicates if this monster is alive.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Players.PlayerInfo.Name
member.summary: The name of the player.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Players.PlayerInfo.HP
member.summary: The player's current HP.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Players.PlayerInfo.MaxHP
member.summary: The player's maximum HP.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Players.PlayerInfo.MP
member.summary: The player's current MP.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Players.PlayerInfo.Stats
member.summary: The player's stats.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Players.PlayerInfo.AFK
member.summary: Whether the player is AFK.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Players.PlayerInfo.EntID
member.summary: The entity ID of the player.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Players.PlayerInfo.Level
member.summary: The player's level.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Players.PlayerInfo.Cell
member.summary: The cell the player is currently in.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Players.PlayerInfo.Pad
member.summary: The pad the player is currently in.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Players.PlayerInfo.X
member.summary: The player's X coordinate.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Players.PlayerInfo.Y
member.summary: The player's Y coordinate.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Players.PlayerInfo.State
member.summary: The player's state.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.ID
member.summary: The ID of the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.Slot
member.summary: The slot of the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.Value
member.summary: The value of the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.Name
member.summary: The name of the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.Description
member.summary: The description of the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.EndText
member.summary: The description of the quest after completion.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.Once
member.summary: Whether this quest can only be completed once.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.Field
member.summary: The field of the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.Index
member.summary: The index of the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.Upgrade
member.summary: Whether this quest requires upgrade.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.Level
member.summary: The level required to accept the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.RequiredClassID
member.summary: The id of the class required to accept the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.RequiredClassPoints
member.summary: The class points required to accept the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.RequiredFactionId
member.summary: The faction required to accept the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.RequiredFactionRep
member.summary: The required faction rep to accept the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.Gold
member.summary: The amount of gold this quest gives as a reward.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.XP
member.summary: The amount of XP this quest gives as a reward.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.Status
member.summary: The status of the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.Active
member.summary: Indicates whether the quest is active or not.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.AcceptRequirements
member.summary: The items required in the player's inventory to accept the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.Requirements
member.summary: The items used to turn in the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.Rewards
member.summary: The items given as a reward for completing the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.Quest.SimpleRewards
member.summary: Item drop rates are mapped to their IDs in this list.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.QuestData.ID
member.summary: The ID of the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.QuestData.Slot
member.summary: The slot of the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.QuestData.Value
member.summary: The value of the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.QuestData.Name
member.summary: The name of the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.QuestData.Once
member.summary: Whether this quest can only be completed once.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.QuestData.Field
member.summary: The field of the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.QuestData.Index
member.summary: The index of the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.QuestData.Upgrade
member.summary: Whether this quest requires upgrade.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.QuestData.Level
member.summary: The level required to accept the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.QuestData.RequiredClassID
member.summary: The id of the class required to accept the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.QuestData.RequiredClassPoints
member.summary: The class points required to accept the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.QuestData.RequiredFactionId
member.summary: The faction required to accept the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.QuestData.RequiredFactionRep
member.summary: The required faction rep to accept the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.QuestData.Gold
member.summary: The amount of gold this quest gives as a reward.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.QuestData.XP
member.summary: The amount of XP this quest gives as a reward.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.QuestData.AcceptRequirements
member.summary: The items required in the player's inventory to accept the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.QuestData.Requirements
member.summary: The items used to turn in the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.QuestData.Rewards
member.summary: The items given as a reward for completing the quest.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.QuestData.SimpleRewards
member.summary: Item drop rates are mapped to their IDs in this list.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.SimpleReward.Rate
member.summary: The rate at which this reward drops.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Quests.SimpleReward.Type
member.summary: The type of the item as an integer ID.

member.name: T:Skua.Core.Models.Servers.Server
member.summary: A class holding information about a game server.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Servers.Server.Name
member.summary: The name of the game server.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Servers.Server.IP
member.summary: The IP address of the game server.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Servers.Server.ChatLevel
member.summary: The chat level of this server (canned = 0, free = 2).

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Servers.Server.Port
member.summary: The port this server listens on.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Servers.Server.Online
member.summary: Indicates whether the server is online.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Servers.Server.Lang
member.summary: The language of this server (en/pt).

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Servers.Server.PlayerCount
member.summary: The number of players currently on the server.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Servers.Server.Upgrade
member.summary: Indicates whether this is an upgrade only server.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Servers.Server.Ping
member.summary: The ping/latency to this server in milliseconds (calculated client-side).

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Shops.ShopItem.ShopItemID
member.summary: The shop specific item id of this item.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Shops.ShopItem.Cost
member.summary: The cost of the item.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Shops.ShopItem.Level
member.summary: The level of the shop item.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Shops.ShopItem.Faction
member.summary: The faction needed to buy this item.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Shops.ShopItem.RequiredReputation
member.summary: The needed reputation amount to buy this item.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Shops.ShopItem.Requirements
member.summary: Requirements to merge this item (if it is a merge item).

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Skills.SkillInfo.ID
member.summary: The ID of the skill.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Skills.SkillInfo.ActID
member.summary: The action ID of the skill.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Skills.SkillInfo.Damage
member.summary: The damage value of the skill.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Skills.SkillInfo.Icon
member.summary: The icon key of the skill.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Skills.SkillInfo.Auto
member.summary: Indicates if the skill is an auto attack.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Skills.SkillInfo.Name
member.summary: The name of the skill.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Skills.SkillInfo.Description
member.summary: The description of the skill.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Skills.SkillInfo.Range
member.summary: The range of the skill.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Skills.SkillInfo.MP
member.summary: The MP consumed by using this skill.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Skills.SkillInfo.IsOk
member.summary: Indicates if the skill is OK (idk what this is).

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Skills.SkillInfo._Anim
member.summary: The animation list of this skill as a string.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Skills.SkillInfo.Animations
member.summary: The animation list of this skill as an array.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Skills.SkillInfo.Type
member.summary: The type of the skill.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Skills.SkillInfo.MinTargets
member.summary: The minimum number of targets this skill must be used on.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Skills.SkillInfo.MaxTargets
member.summary: The maximum number of targets this skill can be used on.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Skills.SkillInfo.Cooldown
member.summary: The cooldown time of this skill in ms.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Skills.SkillInfo.Locked
member.summary: Indicates if this skill is locked.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Models.Skills.SkillInfo.LastUse
member.summary: The timestamp of when this skill was last used.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Models.Skills.SkillUseMode.UseIfAvailable
member.summary: Assumes the skill is used when it should be.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Models.Skills.SkillUseMode.WaitForCooldown
member.summary: Waits for the skill to be available before using it.
